build.beforeDevCommand: cd ../../frontend && npm install && npm run build
build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../../frontend && npm install && npm run build

bundle.shortDescription: Local dashboard for Claude Code token usage
bundle.longDescription: Reads the JSONL transcripts Claude Code writes and turns them into per-prompt cost analytics, tool/file heatmaps, subagent attribution, cache analytics, project comparisons, and a rule-based tips engine.
